pi_items.source: Task description explicitly specifies 'Kailahun District'. Verified that Kailahun exists in the standard Sierra Leone demo database.
Task description explicitly specifies 'Jan 2022' as the start period for the outlier detection analysis.
Task description explicitly specifies 'Dec 2023' as the end period for the outlier detection analysis.
Task description requests to 'flag at least 3 suspicious values', and verifier.py logic explicitly grants points for 'evidenced_flags >= 3'.
Task description and export_result.sh both explicitly define the target report path as '/home/ga/Desktop/kailahun_data_quality_report.txt'.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task operates on the synthetic Sierra Leone DHIS2 demo dataset. The required target organization unit is 'Kailahun' with a date range from '2022-01-01' to '2023-12-31'. The agent is expected to identify and flag at least 3 values for follow-up and create a report strictly at '/home/ga/Desktop/kailahun_data_quality_report.txt'. All metadata claims align perfectly with the explicit task instructions and verifier logic.
